name: Wildlife Planet: The Incremental
short_description: Wildlife Planet is a Simulation & Idle game with the theme of wildlife and nature. You will unlock more and more species as you level up and learn the species knowledge. This is a game with refreshing scenes, immersive background music, and different kinds of wild animals and plants.
detailed_description:
JOIN OUR DISCORD


About the Game

Feeling worn out from the daily grind? Need to unwind and relax? Then why not escape to the great outdoors with the new game Wildlife Planet! This Idle & Simulation game lets you immerse yourself in nature, and discover hundreds of species of animals, plants, birds, and insects across various regions.

Wildlife Planet features stunningly refreshing graphics, and its peaceful background music will transport you to the tranquility of nature. Each region in the game is based on real-life locations, and the descriptions of each species card are verified by professional biologists. This makes it not only a fun game to play, but also an educational one that will help you learn about popular science.


As you level up, you can unlock new species cards and earn numerous rewards, such as drops, gems, and treasure chests. The game also offers an ‘Expedition’ option, which allows you to earn extra rewards. So, what are you waiting for? Escape to nature and start your wildlife adventure today!


Game Features:
* Verified names, taxonomies, and descriptions by biologists to provide valuable educational information.
* Unlock and level up cards of different wildlife
* Refreshing and relaxing graphics based on biology and geography
* Immersive and healing background music
* Numerous rewards in the game, drops, gems, treasure chests...
* An ‘Expedition’ option to get extra rewards

supported_languages: English, French, German, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
